title: Xtra Creamy Uruguayan Beef Stir Fry
description: A savory and creamy Uruguayan dish featuring chilled butter and stir-fry, served in a terracotta dish, this recipe is a show-off dish that is gluten-free friendly.
instructions: Heat a large terracotta dish over medium-high heat on the stovetop.
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the dish and set aside.
Add the chilled butter to the dish and let it melt.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chopped red bell pepper and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the heavy cream, paprika, salt, and black pepper to the dish and stir to combine.
Return the beef to the dish and stir to coat with the creamy sauce.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 2-3 minutes or until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
